critical_invariants: Bitmap consistency: every allocated block must have its bit set, every freed block must have its bit cleared
2MB page alignment: all VRAM allocations must be aligned to 2MB (0x200000) boundaries
Bitmap location at SystemVariables + 0x3000 (2KB) must not change
Alloc/free must be atomic with bitmap update - no partial updates visible to other CPUs
Double-free protection: freeing an already-free block must be detected or safely ignored
Bitmap size must accurately represent total VRAM capacity
Returned allocation addresses must be within valid VRAM aperture range (BAR1)
known_opportunities: First-fit to best-fit: reduce fragmentation by finding smallest sufficient free region
Bitmap scan optimization: use BSF/BSR (bit scan forward/reverse) instead of byte-by-byte loop
POPCNT for fast free-space counting without full bitmap traversal
Cache last-allocation position for next-fit to avoid rescanning from start
Bulk allocation: allocate contiguous N pages in single bitmap update using BITMASK operations
Buddy allocator upgrade: replace flat bitmap with buddy system for O(log n) alloc/free
LZCNT/TZCNT for leading/trailing zero count to find free runs faster
Prefetch bitmap cache lines ahead of scan direction
